title: On Adaptation Measures to Solve Tel-Aviv’s Environmental Problems with “Sunny Rain”
abstract: Adaptation measures were proposed using "Sunny Rain" to solve Tel Aviv's environmental problems to cool the air in the city and save humanity from climate catastrophe and fight air pollution; the Yarkon, "Tel Aviv's main river" will no longer be a dirty ditch; the fog from Ben-Gurion Airport was cleaned; neighborhoods, parks, around Tel Aviv were greened and all green spaces were irrigated with "Sunny Rain".
subject: Tel aviv
Adaptation (eye)
Environmental science
Meteorology
